response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video to detect any vocal music. 2. Observed consistent Minecraft gameplay with voice commentary. 3. response.global_summary: The video features a VTuber, Houshou Marine, playing Minecraft and providing live voice commentary in Japanese. Throughout the entire video, there is no background vocal music playing.

scenes.description: The VTuber, Houshou Marine, plays Minecraft, interacting with villagers, managing inventory, and talking to viewers throughout the video.
